title: Competent, capable, commissioned, and obligate were all adapted from the Arabic termمكلف , which were interpreted based on the translators’ comprehension;

evidence.raw_text:
this term as such divorce genre does not exist in the 
English culture (TL). Hence, the translators adapted the Arabic term ‘raj’i’ to convey the meaning 
of revocable (may be cancelled or revoked)
evidence.clean_text: The translation into English was done by using the equivalent translation procedure. The fact that this is an indirect translation of the term demonstrates the role of language norms in translation.
